caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt sits in a room that looks like a clothing store or studio. His shirt features white text that reads "I NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone and speaks throughout the sequence, with his facial expressions shifting as he talks. Behind him, the wall is decorated with several framed photographs, and a white male mannequin wearing a white garment stands to his right. Racks of colorful clothing are visible in the background. Small logos appear in the lower corners of the frames, including one that reads "SURE" inside a circular badge and another that says "HOT" in red text. The scene remains static except for the man's mouth movements and slight shifts in his head position as he continues speaking.
